hero.eyebrow: PUBLIC DATA AUTOMATION AUDIT · PATTAYA CLINICS
hero.title: SEA Clinic already has reputation. The next growth layer is structured automation.
hero.subtitle: A public-footprint audit showing how WhatsApp, LINE, reviews, treatment demand and competitor signals can become a tracked clinic growth system.

key_findings: SEA Clinic has a strong public treatment catalog and clear doctor-led trust positioning.
The public website shows multiple high-margin treatment categories but the visible conversion path is mainly consultation via WhatsApp/contact form.
Review assets are strong enough to power an automated review engine and multilingual social proof layer.
Competitor pressure is visible in Botox and beauty-clinic marketplaces; price-sensitive leads should be separated from premium consultation leads.
The biggest commercial opportunity is not more content. It is structured inquiry capture, lead scoring, reminders and post-treatment reviews.

cta.title: Proposed build
cta.copy: AI Clinic Concierge + Review Engine + Competitor Radar for Pattaya aesthetic clinics.
